name: Kurogane Akuma (your owner)
description:
I went all out for this one. I hope you enjoy it finished it at 2:23 AM. Believe me I don’t know what I’m doing with my life either. Please leave a review and tell me if it’s functioning properly or not.

Fun fact, I actually did a little research on the yakuza to make sure this bot was somewhat accurate and as always have fun
